title: Layout
description: Flexbox-style props shared by every node in a Sone tree — sizing, spacing, alignment, transforms.

types.name: LayoutProps
types.description: Core layout properties - mirrors CSS Flexbox/Grid with additional visual styling

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

title: Text
description: Properties on the Text node, plus the TextDefault wrapper.

types.name: TextProps
types.description: Text block properties extending span properties

properties.name: lineBreak
properties.description: line breaking algorithm used for wrapped text

properties.name: tabStops
properties.description: tab stop positions in pixels, relative to the text content left edge

properties.name: tabLeader
properties.description: character used to fill tab stop gaps, e.g. "." for dot leader (MS Word style)

properties.name: baseDir
properties.description:
Base paragraph direction for bidirectional text rendering.
- "ltr": left-to-right (default)
- "rtl": right-to-left (Arabic, Hebrew, etc.)
- "auto": auto-detect from the first strong directional character

When set to "rtl" or resolved "rtl" via "auto", text segments are
rendered from right to left and the default alignment becomes "right".

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: text orientation in degrees — affects layout dimensions

properties.name: clipImage
properties.description: image to display through text letterforms (clip-image effect)

properties.name: textDir
properties.description:
Text rendering direction for this span.
Overrides the paragraph-level baseDir for this specific span.
Use "rtl" for RTL scripts (Arabic, Hebrew) embedded in LTR text,
or "ltr" for LTR text embedded in RTL paragraphs.

title: Span
description: Inline runs inside a Text node. Spans inherit the parent Text style and override only what is set.

types.name: SpanProps
types.description: Text styling properties for spans and text

properties.name: textDir
properties.description:
Text rendering direction for this span.
Overrides the paragraph-level baseDir for this specific span.
Use "rtl" for RTL scripts (Arabic, Hebrew) embedded in LTR text,
or "ltr" for LTR text embedded in RTL paragraphs.

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

properties.name: toLocaleString
properties.type: { (locales?: string | string[] | undefined, options?: NumberFormatOptions | undefined): string; (locales?: LocalesArgument, options?: NumberFormatOptions | undefined): string; } | (() => string)

title: Photo
description: Image node — local path, URL, or Buffer.

properties.name: clipPath
properties.description: SVG path string to clip the image (path coords relative to photo top-left)

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

properties.name: bounds
properties.description: path bounding box [left, top, right, bottom] (computed)

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

types.name: ListProps
types.description: List marker and container customization properties

properties.name: listStyle
properties.description: Bullet/numbering style: "disc" (•), "circle" (◦), "square" (▪), "dash" (–), "decimal", "none", custom string, a SpanNode for full styling, or an arrow function `(index: number) => SpanNode` for dynamic per-item markers (index is 0-based)

properties.name: markerGap
properties.description: Gap between marker and item content (default: 8)

properties.name: markerOffset
properties.description: Top and bottom padding applied to each marker (default: 0)

properties.name: startIndex
properties.description: Starting number for decimal lists — named startIndex because "start" is taken by LayoutProps (CSS inset-inline-start)

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

title: ClipGroup
description: Mask the content node with the shape of the clip node.

types.name: ClipGroupProps
types.description: Layout props for a clip-group container

properties.name: clipPath
properties.description: SVG path data that defines the clip region for all children

properties.name: pageBreak
properties.description: Page breaking hint — only meaningful when pageHeight is set in render config

title: Render config
description: Top-level options passed to sone(tree, config).

properties.name: pageHeight
properties.description: When set, enables pagination — each page is this many pixels tall

properties.name: header
properties.description:
Node (or function returning a node) rendered at the top of every page.
When a function, it receives `{ pageNumber, totalPages }` per page.

properties.name: footer
properties.description:
Node (or function returning a node) rendered at the bottom of every page.
When a function, it receives `{ pageNumber, totalPages }` per page.

properties.name: margin
properties.type: number | { top?: number | undefined; right?: number | undefined; bottom?: number | undefined; left?: number | undefined; }
properties.description:
Page margins (pixels). A single number applies to all sides; an object
sets each side individually. Left/right expand the canvas; top/bottom
add space between the header/footer bands and the content area.

properties.name: lastPageHeight
properties.description:
Controls the height of the last page.
- `"uniform"` (default) — every page canvas is the same height; the last
  page has whitespace below the content.
- `"content"` — the last page canvas is only as tall as its content.

types.name: SoneHeaderFooter
types.description:
A header or footer value: either a static node (same on every page) or a
function that receives page info and returns a node (rendered per-page).
